object_a.label: door
object_a.description: narrow interior doorway with white jamb on right wall
object_a.long_form_open_description: Small, open or recessed interior doorway set into the right wall; framed with white trim. Only the jamb and part of the opening are visible from this camera angle; appears to lead into another room or closet along the corridor.
object_a.location_relative_to_other_objects: on the right side of the hall, slightly ahead of the damaged patch on the right wall and opposite the left closet doors

object_b.label: door
object_b.description: closed white door centered in the far wall
object_b.long_form_open_description: Standard white interior door with raised panels located on the back wall centered in the image. The door is closed and set within a narrow recessed section of wall; visible door trim is white. Appears to lead to another room or closet down a short hallway.
object_b.location_relative_to_other_objects: Directly ahead from the camera viewpoint; positioned between the dresser (left) and the open bathroom doorway (right).
